prompt_en: Inside the bowling alley, the bowling balls produce a deep rolling sound as they move, accompanied by crisp collision noises when the balls hit the pins. The environment features slight reverberation, with soft and slow-tempo background music. Occasionally, the sound of shoes scuffing against the floor can be heard on the lanes, creating a wide and three-dimensional sound field. Special attention is given to synchronizing the sound effects with the visual of the ball hitting the pins, emphasizing the transient characteristics of the impact sound.
prompt_vision: Inside a bowling alley, a bowling ball rolls down the lane and strikes the pins.
